memberdef.argsstring: (self, str local_peer_id, NATInfo local_nat, ISP local_isp, int max_retry_attempts=DEFAULT_MAX_RETRY_ATTEMPTS, int sync_timeout_ms=DEFAULT_SYNC_TIMEOUT_MS)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim:
Initialize DCUtR protocol
Args: local_peer_id: Local peer ID local_nat: Local NAT information local_isp: Local ISP max_retry_attempts: Maximum number of retry attempts sync_timeout_ms: Timeout for synchronous operations

memberdef.argsstring: (self, asyncio.StreamReader relay_reader, asyncio.StreamWriter relay_writer, List[str] local_addrs, str remote_peer_id)
memberdef.name: upgrade_to_direct

para.verbatim:
Attempt to upgrade relay connection to direct connection
This method initiates the DCUtR protocol as the active peer (the peer that initiates the upgrade).
Args: relay_reader: Reader for relay connection relay_writer: Writer for relay connection local_addrs: Local observed/predicted addresses remote_peer_id: Remote peer ID
Returns: DCUtRResult with connection details

memberdef.argsstring: (self, asyncio.StreamReader relay_reader, asyncio.StreamWriter relay_writer, List[str] local_addrs)
memberdef.name: handle_incoming_upgrade

para.verbatim:
Handle incoming DCUtR upgrade request (passive side)
This method handles the DCUtR protocol as the passive peer (the peer that receives the upgrade request).
Args: relay_reader: Reader for relay connection relay_writer: Writer for relay connection local_addrs: Local observed/predicted addresses
Returns: DCUtRResult with connection details

Perform a single upgrade attempt
Args: local_addrs: Local addresses to share
Returns: DCUtRResult

Perform simultaneous connection attempt
Implements TCP Simultaneous Open for TCP addresses Implements QUIC hole punching for QUIC addresses
Args: addrs: Remote addresses to connect to delay_sec: Delay before initiating connection (for synchronization)
Returns: DCUtRResult

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str ip, int port, float delay_sec, float timeout)
memberdef.name: _tcp_connect

para.verbatim:
Attempt TCP simultaneous open connection
Args: ip: Remote IP address port: Remote port delay_sec: Delay before connecting timeout: Connection timeout
Returns: DCUtRResult

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str ip, int port, float delay_sec, float timeout)
memberdef.name: _quic_connect

para.verbatim:
Attempt QUIC hole punching connection
For QUIC, sends UDP packets to punch through NAT
Args: ip: Remote IP address port: Remote port delay_sec: Delay before connecting timeout: Operation timeout
Returns: DCUtRResult

Parse multiaddr string
Supports: - /ip4/<ip>/tcp/<port> - /ip6/<ip>/tcp/<port> - /ip4/<ip>/udp/<port>/quic
Returns: Tuple of (protocol, ip, port) or None

DCUtR Protocol Implementation
Manages the upgrade from relay connections to direct connections using coordinated hole punching.
